## [00:00 - 03:03]

Hey guys, welcome back. In this video, we're going to talk about custom fields. Now, one of the things you need to understand when building flows is that it is best practice to map out where you want your flow to go and what you want to ask in those flows before you actually start to build. So in case of a restaurant booking, what information do we want to have from the client before we can make a reservation? Well, we want to know when they are coming, who's making the booking, what is their email address, what's their phone number, with how many people are there coming, are there any allergies? That's all stuff that you need to know beforehand, and that's not something you want to figure out while you are building the flow. And we're going to dive into actual processes in the flow design section, and there's a specific video about that, but I just want you to be aware of that. When you map your flow and you know where you want to go and you want to know which questions you ask, you can pre-populate or you can pre-create the custom fields where you're going to store the data in, which you're going to ask your subscribers. And then you can have different types, text, number, date, date and time, true or false. So this is where you will populate your custom fields based on the map you made before you start building. Now, going back to the actual flow. Let me go in there. There we go. There's our mastern. So we want to ask the person who wants to book. We want to ask them a couple questions.
